summary: The team discussed challenges with speaker diarization and text-to-speech features, comparing their current system with Naver Clova Note. Key issues include the need for accurate speaker separation, correction of transcription errors, and technical difficulties with AI model approvals, specifically concerning Pyannote versions and their dependencies. They are exploring alternative AI models due to Pyannote's failure in speaker diarization. Upcoming deadlines include uploading materials by 3:20-3:25 PM and a same-day submission.
